hypothesis: ADR-EMA Bollinger Donchian and ROC is an effective trading strategy
Using volatility to identify trends for entries and mean reversion for exits as price often trades within a range until volatility increases.

Using ADR, DMI, EMA + OBV and ROC indicators with the hourly 0GUSDC market data will generate a trading strategy that profits from strong trends while minimizing losses during ranging markets. The volatility hour-based entries (qrtz_timezones) are used to determine entry points for our strategy.
